title: Bafuputsi ba go Tswa Yuropa ba Fitlhela Aforika Borwa
subject: History
caps_topic: Explorers from Europe find southern Africa

meta.title: Bafuputsi ba go Tswa Yuropa ba Fitlhela Aforika Borwa
meta.subject: History
meta.caps_topic: Explorers from Europe find southern Africa

sources.title: Bartolomeu Dias reaches present Mossel Bay
Portuguese navigator Bartholomew Dias erects the first stone cross on the South African coast
Explorer and navigator Vasco da Gama completes his voyage round the Cape of Good Hope to India
Van Riebeeck lands at the Cape
Jan van Riebeeck, Dutch colonial administrator and first commander of the colony at the Cape of Good Hope, is born

slides.eyebrow: Hisitori ya Mophato wa 6 - Kgato ya Magareng
slides.title: Bafuputsi ba go Tswa Yuropa ba Fitlhela Aforika Borwa
slides.lead: Ka moo basepedi ba dikepe ba Portugal le ba Dutch ba neng ba fitlha kwa ntlheng ya Aforika, le gore maeto a bona a maleele a ne a raya eng mo bathong ba ba neng ba setse ba nna fano.

media.alt: Sekepe sa logong se se sepelang ka maphoto mo makhubung a a botala jwa lewatle fa thoko ga lotshitshi lo lotala lwa Aforika Borwa, ka fa tlase ga letsatsi le le phatsimang.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='320' height='62' fill='#3a6b8a'/><path d='M0 118 q40 -10 80 0 t80 0 t80 0 t80 0 v62 H0 Z' fill='#2f5a78'/><circle cx='262' cy='42' r='24' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M40 118 L64 108 h96 l24 10 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/><rect x='108' y='58' width='4' height='60' fill='#5c3f26'/><path d='M112 60 q40 8 0 46 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M112 60 q-38 8 0 46 Z' fill='#dcd3c2'/></svg>

slides.notes: Simolola ka go botsa barutwana gore 'mofuputsi' ke eng le gore ke ka ntlha yang batho bogologolo ba ne ba sepela ka dikepe go tsena mo mawatleng a ba neng ba sa a itse. Baya dikakanyo tse pedi tse dikgolo tsa thuto: (1) basepedi ba dikepe ba go tswa Portugal mme morago Netherlands (Holland) ba ile ba fitlhela tsela ya lewatle e e dikologang Aforika Borwa, le (2) go goroga ga bona go ile ga fetola botshelo jwa Khoikhoi le San ba ba neng ba setse ba nna fano. Gakolola barutwana gore go 'fitlhela' lefelo ga go reye gore le ne le le lolea - batho ba ne ba nnile fano dingwaga di le dikete.

slides.title: Ke ka ntlha yang batho ba Yuropa ba ne ba batla go sepela ka dikepe go ya borwa?
slides.lead: Ba ne ba batla tsela ya lewatle e e yang kgwebong e e humileng ya Botlhaba.

blocks.text: Bogologolo, dinokwane tse di jaaka pelepele le sinamone, mmogo le silika le gouta, di ne di tla kwa Yuropa go tswa kgakala kwa India le Botlhaba. Di ne di tsamaya ka bonya mo lefatsheng, ka jalo di ne di **tura** thata.

items: Dikgosi tsa Yuropa di ne di batla tsela e e bonako, e e sa tureng ya go fitlha Botlhaba ka lewatle.
Batho ba **Portugal** ba ile ba swetsa go sepela ka dikepe go ya borwa go bapa le lotshitshi lwa Aforika go batla tsela eo.
Ga go ope kwa Yuropa yo o neng a itse gore a dikepe di ka kgona go dikologa karolo e e kwa tlase ya Aforika.

media.alt: Dikgetsana tse dinnye le dinkgwana tsa dinokwane le madi a tshipi fa thoko, di supa dithoto tsa kgwebo tse di tlhwatlhwa e kwa godimo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 120 q10 -46 30 -46 q20 0 30 46 Z' fill='#8a5a2a'/><path d='M96 120 q9 -40 26 -40 q17 0 26 40 Z' fill='#b5732f'/><ellipse cx='70' cy='76' rx='18' ry='6' fill='#5c3a17'/><ellipse cx='122' cy='82' rx='16' ry='6' fill='#7a4a1f'/><circle cx='168' cy='104' r='14' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='184' cy='112' r='12' fill='#d18f2c'/><circle cx='176' cy='94' r='10' fill='#f0b24a'/></svg>

slides.notes: E boloke e le e e tshwaraganeng: lebaka la maeto a a kotsi eno e ne e le madi le kgwebo. Dinokwane di ne di dirisiwa go naya dijo tatso le go di boloka, mme di ne di na le tlhwatlhwa e kgolo. Tlhalosa gore ka nako eno batho ba Yuropa ba ne ba tshwanetse go reka dithoto tsa Botlhaba ka bagwebi ba le bantsi, se se neng se dira gore di ture - tsela e e tlhamaletseng ya lewatle e ne e tla letla Portugal go gweba ka boyona. O se ka wa imela barutwana ka maina gone jaanong; bafuputsi ba tla mo go latelang.

slides.title: Batho ba ba neng ba setse ba nna fano
slides.lead: Aforika Borwa e ne e le legae la Khoikhoi le San bogologolo pele ga sekepe sepe sa Yuropa se goroga.

blocks.text: **San** e ne e le batsomi le baselakwa ba ba neng ba tsoma diphologolo mme ba sela dimela. **Khoikhoi** ba ne ba tlhokomela matsomane a dikgomo le dinku mme ba fuduga go batla bojang jo bosha le metsi. Mmogo ba tlwaetse go bidiwa **Khoisan**.

items: Ba ne ba nnile mo Aforika Borwa dingwaga di le dikete.
Khoikhoi ba ba neng ba le gaufi le lotshitshi ba ile ba kopana le basepedi ba dikepe ba ntlha ba Yuropa sefatlhego ka sefatlhego.
Lefatshe leno e ne e le legae la bona - le ne le se lolea kgotsa le emetse go 'fitlhelwa'.

media.alt: Dikgomo di le pedi di fula mo lefatsheng le letala fa thoko ga ntlwana ya bojang e e kgolokwe, di supa badisa ba Khoikhoi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='108' width='240' height='52' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M30 108 q26 -30 52 0 Z' fill='#c8a25a'/><path d='M40 108 v-12 h4 v12 Z' fill='#8a6a34'/><g fill='#5c3a1f'><ellipse cx='150' cy='96' rx='22' ry='12'/><rect x='134' y='96' width='4' height='16'/><rect x='160' y='96' width='4' height='16'/><path d='M130 90 q-6 -6 -2 -10' stroke='#5c3a1f' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></g><g fill='#7a5a3a'><ellipse cx='196' cy='104' rx='16' ry='9'/><rect x='185' y='104' width='3' height='12'/><rect x='203' y='104' width='3' height='12'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Selaese seno se botlhokwa mo hisitoring e e siameng le e e boammaaruri. Tlhalosa sentle gore batho ba ne ba nnile fano nako e telele thata ka mekgwa ya bona ya botshelo. Farologanya ka bonolo: San e ne e le batsomi le baselakwa, Khoikhoi e ne e le badisa ba ba nang le dikgomo le dinku. Lefoko 'go sibolla' kgotsa 'go fitlhela' le dirisiwa go tswa ponong ya Ma-Yuropa; Khoisan ba ne ba setse ba itse lefatshe leno e le legae. Se se baya 'kgolagano ya ntlha' moragonyana.

slides.title: Portugal e etelela pele
slides.lead: Kgato ka kgato, basepedi ba dikepe ba Portugal ba ile ba dira mmapa wa lotshitshi lwa bophirima jwa Aforika.

blocks.text: Basepedi ba dikepe ba **Portugal** ba ne ba sa sepele tsela yotlhe ka nako e le nngwe. Mo leetong lengwe le lengwe ba ne ba tswelela go ya borwa go feta fa go bapa le lotshitshi lwa Aforika mme ba boela gae go abelana se ba ithutileng sona.

items: Ba ne ba sepela ka dikepe tse di nonofileng tsa logong tse di bidiwang **dicaravel** tse di neng di kgona go sepela di lebagane le phefo.
Mokapoteni mongwe le mongwe o ne a oketsa lotshitshi lo losha mo dimmapeng tsa Portugal.
Maikaelelo a bona e ne e sa ntse e le go batla bokhutlo jo bo kgakala jwa Aforika le go tswelela go ya Botlhaba.

media.alt: Sekepe sa caravel se se nang le dikota tse tharo le maseila a masweu a a tletseng mo lewatleng.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='220' height='42' fill='#3a6b8a'/><path d='M46 118 L70 106 h84 l22 12 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='3'><line x1='78' y1='40' x2='78' y2='106'/><line x1='112' y1='30' x2='112' y2='106'/><line x1='146' y1='44' x2='146' y2='106'/></g><path d='M80 44 q26 6 0 40 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M114 34 q30 8 0 48 Z' fill='#dcd3c2'/><path d='M148 48 q22 6 0 36 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='110' y='30' width='16' height='10' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Tlhalosa gore go fuputsa e ne e le tsamaiso e e bonya, e e kelotlhoko, kgato ka kgato mo dingwageng di le dintsi, e seng leeto le le lengwe fela. Tsenya caravel: sekepe se se motlhofo, se se bonako se se neng se kgona go sepela se lebagane le phefo, se se neng se dira gore maeto a maleele a lewatle a kgonege. Boloka maina a le motlhofo fano - dikapoteni tse pedi tse di tumileng (Dias le da Gama) ba na le diselaese tsa bona mo go latelang.

slides.eyebrow: Ba ne ba sa timele jang?
slides.title: Go bona tsela mo lewatleng
slides.lead: Ka ba se na dimmapa tsa lewatle le le atlhameng, basepedi ba dikepe ba ne ba dirisa letsatsi, dinaledi le didirisiwa tse di motlhofo.

blocks.text: Kwa kgakala mo lewatleng ga go na ditsela kgotsa matshwao a ditsela. Bafuputsi ba ne ba dirisa **khampasi** go bona bokone, mme ba ne ba lebelela **letsatsi le dinaledi** go lemoga gore ba kae.

items: Sedirisiwa se se bidiwang **astrolabe** se ne se thusa go lekanya gore letsatsi kgotsa naledi e ne e le kwa godimo go le kae mo loaping.
Ba Portugal ba ne ba jala difapaano tse dikgolo tsa maje, tse di bidiwang **padrao**, mo lotshitshing go tshwaya gore ba fitlhile kae.
Maeto a ne a le kotsi - matsubutsubu, tlala le bolwetse di ne di ka wela batho ba le kgakala le gae.

media.alt: Khampasi e e kgolokwe e e supang bokone, fa thoko ga sefapaano se se seleele sa leje se se jetsweng mo lotshitshing.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='72' cy='80' r='40' fill='#dcd3c2' stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M72 46 L82 80 L72 114 L62 80 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M72 80 L82 80' stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='2'/><text x='72' y='40' font-size='11' text-anchor='middle' fill='#5c3f26'>N</text><rect x='150' y='40' width='10' height='84' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='134' y='58' width='42' height='10' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='128' y='120' width='54' height='14' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Se ke selaese se se kgatlhang, se se dirang - barutwana ba Mophato wa 6 ba itumelela 'ka moo'. Tlhalosa ka bonolo gore lomao lwa khampasi lo supa bokone ka metlha, le gore boleele jwa letsatsi kgotsa dinaledi bo ne bo bolelela basepedi ba dikepe gore ba kwa bokone kgotsa borwa go le kae. Tsenya 'padrao' (sefapaano sa leje) ka gonne Dias o ile a jala se le sengwe mme se tlhaga mo selaeseng se se latelang. Gatelela kotsi ya nnete go aga tlotlo ya ka moo maeto ano a neng a le thata ka teng.

slides.title: Bartolomeu Dias o dikologa Kapa
slides.lead: Ka 1488 mokapoteni wa Portugal e ne ya nna Mo-Yuropa wa ntlha yo o itsegeng go dikologa ntlha ya Aforika ka sekepe.

blocks.text: **Bartolomeu Dias** o ile a sepela go ya borwa go fitlha setsubutsubu se foka dikepe tsa gagwe go dikologa karolo e e kwa tlase ya Aforika a sa bone lefatshe. O ne a dikologile **Kapa**, a supa gore dikepe di ka fitlha Botlhaba ka lewatle.

items: O ile a kgoroga kwa Mossel Bay mme a jala sefapaano sa leje mo lotshitshing.
Kwa tshimologong o ne a bitsa ntlha eo 'Kapa ya Matsubutsubu' ka ntlha ya bosa jo bo bosula.
Kgosi ya Portugal e ile ya e reetsa leina le lesha ya re ke **Kapa ya Tsholofelo e Ntle** (Cape of Good Hope), ka gonne jaanong go ne go na le tsholofelo ya go fitlha India.

media.alt: Sekepe se se kgarametswang ke phefo e e maatla le makhubu go dikologa kapa e e majang, ka sefapaano sa leje mo ntlheng ya lefatshe.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='110' width='240' height='50' fill='#3a6b8a'/><path d='M0 110 q30 -14 60 0 t60 0 t60 0 t60 0 v50 H0 Z' fill='#2f5a78'/><path d='M150 110 q40 -30 90 -20 v20 Z' fill='#6b6152'/><rect x='196' y='58' width='7' height='34' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='186' y='68' width='27' height='7' fill='#b7a98d'/><path d='M48 108 L68 98 h44 l16 10 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/><line x1='84' y1='60' x2='84' y2='98' stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M86 62 q30 8 0 34 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M20 40 q30 8 60 2' stroke='#9aa77f' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Se ke lengwe la maeto a mabedi a botlhokwa a thuto. Gatelela 1488 le kakanyo ya 'wa ntlha' go tswa mo direkotong tsa Yuropa. Bolela kgang ka bonolo: setsubutsubu se ile sa isa Dias go dikologa Kapa e ka nna ka kotsi, se se ileng sa supa gore tsela ya lewatle e ne e kgonega. Phetogo ya leina go tswa 'Kapa ya Matsubutsubu' go ya 'Kapa ya Tsholofelo e Ntle' ke ntlha e e gakologelwang - botsa barutwana gore ke ka ntlha yang 'tsholofelo e ntle' e ne e le leina le le siameng. [SME] Tsweetswee netefatsa mafoko a gore Dias o ile a kgoroga kwa Mossel Bay le go rewa ga leina la Kapa kgatlhanong le sengwako sa SAHO pele ga tlhagiso.

slides.title: Vasco da Gama o fitlha India
slides.lead: Mo e ka nnang dingwaga di le lesome moragonyana, mokapoteni yo mongwe wa Portugal o ile a sepela tsela yotlhe go ya India le go boa.

blocks.text: **Vasco da Gama** o ile a simolola leeto ka 1497. Dikepe tsa gagwe di ile tsa ema fa go bapa le lotshitshi lwa Aforika Borwa go batla metsi a masha le go ikhutsa, morago ga foo tsa sepela go ya kwa godimo ga lotshitshi lwa botlhaba go kgabaganyetsa **India**, e a ileng a e fitlhela ka 1498.

items: O ile a reetsa lotshitshi lwa botlhaba leina la **Natal**, ka gonne o ne a lo feta gaufi le Keresemose.
O ile a bula tsela e e feletseng ya lewatle go tswa Yuropa go ya Botlhaba.
Jaanong dikepe tsa Portugal di ne di feta Kapa gantsi mo tseleng ya tsona ya go gweba.

media.alt: Mmapa o motlhofo o o supang tsela ya go sepela ka dikepe ya dintlhana go tswa Yuropa go ya tlase go dikologa Aforika go kgabaganyetsa India.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#3a6b8a'/><path d='M70 20 q-16 40 8 70 q18 22 0 46 q-6 12 14 12 q26 0 30 -22' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M150 24 q22 30 6 66 q-10 22 8 40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M60 26 C40 60 70 96 78 120 C82 138 120 138 150 120' fill='none' stroke='#f4efe6' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/><circle cx='60' cy='26' r='5' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='150' cy='120' r='5' fill='#e8a13a'/><text x='60' y='16' font-size='10' fill='#f4efe6' text-anchor='middle'>Portugal</text><text x='176' y='118' font-size='10' fill='#f4efe6' text-anchor='middle'>India</text></svg>

slides.notes: Leeto la bobedi la botlhokwa. Da Gama o ile a wetsa se Dias a se simolotseng: tsela e e bulegileng ya lewatle e e yang go fitlha India. Supa mo mmapeng ka moo tsela e ngaparelang lotshitshi lwa Aforika le go dikologa Kapa. Tlhalosa gore 'Natal' e amana le tsalo/Keresemose, se ke sona se a ileng a le dirisa gaufi le la 25 Sedimonthole. Morago ga se, Kapa ya nna lefelo la go ema le le tlwaelegileng la dikepe tse di fetang - se se isang kwa Ma-Dutch. [SME] Netefatsa go rewa ga leina la Natal le matlha a 1497-1498 kgatlhanong le SAHO pele ga tlhagiso.

slides.title: Go kopana kwa Kapa
slides.lead: Fa basepedi ba dikepe le Khoikhoi ba kopana, go ne go na le kgwebo mmogo le, ka dinako tse dingwe, kgotlhang.

blocks.text: Dikepe tse di fetang di ne di tlhoka metsi a masha, nama le boikhutso. Ka dinako tse dingwe basepedi ba dikepe ba ne ba **gwebisa** tshipi le difaha le Khoikhoi go bona dikgomo le dinku. Mme matlhakore a mabedi a ne a sa bue puo e le nngwe, mme go se utlwane go ne go ka nna kotsi.

items: Kgwebo e ne e thusa basepedi ba dikepe ba ba lapileng go bona dijo tse disha tsa leeto le leleele.
Ka 1510 ntwa e ile ya tsoga kwa Table Bay mme moeteledipele wa Portugal le bontsi jwa banna ba gagwe ba ile ba bolawa.
Dingwaga di le dintsi morago ga foo, bontsi jwa dikepe tsa Portugal di ile tsa itlhophela go se eme kwa Kapa.

media.alt: Ditlhopha di le pedi tsa batho di lebaganeng mo lotshitshing, e nngwe e le fa thoko ga mokoro, ba ananya dithoto.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='240' height='42' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect y='100' width='240' height='18' fill='#3a6b8a'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='70' cy='70' r='10'/><rect x='63' y='82' width='14' height='30'/><circle cx='98' cy='72' r='10'/><rect x='91' y='84' width='14' height='28'/></g><g fill='#7a5a3a'><circle cx='160' cy='70' r='10'/><rect x='153' y='82' width='14' height='30'/><circle cx='188' cy='72' r='10'/><rect x='181' y='84' width='14' height='28'/></g><rect x='118' y='86' width='6' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M206 100 q16 -6 30 0 v10 h-30 Z' fill='#5c3f26'/></svg>

slides.notes: Tshwara se ka kelotlhoko le ka boammaaruri mo boemong jwa Mophato wa 6. Kgolagano e ne e na le matlhakore a mabedi: kgwebo ya kagiso LE kgotlhang. Kgotlhang ya 1510 kwa Table Bay (mo go yona Viceroy wa Portugal Francisco de Almeida le banna ba le bantsi ba neng ba swa) ke lona lebaka la go bo ba Portugal ba ile ba tila Kapa morago ga foo. Tila go pega molato mo letlhakoreng le le lengwe; tlhalosa gore go tlhoka puo e le nngwe le mekgwa e e farologaneng go ne go dira gore go tshepana go nne thata. [SME] Tsweetswee netefatsa tiragalo ya 1510 ya Table Bay, boitseanape jwa moeteledipele, le mafoko a batho ba ba suleng pele ga tlhagiso - e boloke e le e e tshwanetseng dingwaga.

slides.title: Ma-Dutch le VOC
slides.lead: Dingwaga tse di fetang lekgolo moragonyana, bagwebi ba go tswa Netherlands ba ne ba tlhoka lefelo la go ema mo bogareng jwa tsela e e yang Botlhaba.

blocks.text: **Dutch East India Company**, e e itsegeng ka ditlhaka tsa yona tsa Sedatšhe **VOC**, e ne e romela dikepe di le dintsi fa gare ga Yuropa le Botlhaba. Kapa e ne e le fela mo bogareng jwa leeto leo le leleele.

items: Basepedi ba dikepe mo maetong a maleele ba ne ba lwala gantsi ka ntlha ya go tlhoka dijo le metsi a masha.
VOC e ne e batla **seteishene sa go ijesa** kwa Kapa go lema merogo le go bona nama e ntšhwa.
Ka jalo Khampani e ile ya swetsa go romela batho go aga lefelo kwa Table Bay.

media.alt: Folaga ya sekepe sa kgwebo fa thoko ga mabokoso le megopo, e supa lefelo la kgwebo la khampani.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='40' y='30' width='6' height='100' fill='#5c3f26'/><path d='M46 32 h60 v34 h-60 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><text x='76' y='55' font-size='16' text-anchor='middle' fill='#5c1414'>VOC</text><g fill='#7a5a3a'><rect x='120' y='96' width='36' height='34'/><rect x='158' y='104' width='30' height='26'/></g><g stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='2'><line x1='120' y1='113' x2='156' y2='113'/><line x1='138' y1='96' x2='138' y2='130'/></g><ellipse cx='176' cy='104' rx='15' ry='6' fill='#8a6a34'/></svg>

slides.notes: Kgolaganya go tswa go ba Portugal go ya go Ma-Dutch. Gatelela lebaka: VOC e ne e le khampani e kgolo ya kgwebo e dikepe tsa yona di neng di tsaya dikgwedi go fitlha Botlhaba, mme basepedi ba dikepe ba ne ba lwala (gantsi ka ntlha ya sekabu/scurvy, go tswa mo go tlhokeng dijo tse disha). 'Seteishene sa go ijesa' se se mo bogareng kwa Kapa se ne se tla naya merogo e mesha, metsi le nama. Se ke lona lebaka la go bo Ma-Dutch a ne a tla - kgwebo le go abelwa, e seng go aga naga kwa tshimologong.

slides.title: Jan van Riebeeck kwa Kapa
slides.lead: Ka 1652 VOC e ile ya romela Jan van Riebeeck go tlhoma seteishene sa go ijesa.

blocks.text: **Jan van Riebeeck** o ile a goroga kwa Table Bay ka Moranang 1652 le setlhotshwana sa batho. Ba ile ba aga lesakana la pabalesego mme ba jala tshingwana e kgolo ya merogo go fepa dikepe tse di fetang.

items: Ba ne ba lema merogo le maungo mme ba tlhokomela diphologolo go bona nama e ntšhwa.
Ba ne ba gwebisana le Khoikhoi go bona dikgomo le dinku.
Seteishene se sennye seno se ile sa gola ka bonya - sa nna tshimologo ya bonno jo bo tswelelang jwa Ma-Yuropa.

media.alt: Lesakana le le sebopego sa naledi fa thoko ga mela e e rulaganeng ya tshingwana ya merogo ka fa tlase ga thaba e e nang le tlhoa e e papaletseng.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M20 60 h120 l16 -22 h44 v42 H20 Z' fill='#9aa77f'/><rect y='96' width='240' height='64' fill='#7a8b5a'/><g stroke='#3f6b45' stroke-width='3'><line x1='30' y1='108' x2='150' y2='108'/><line x1='30' y1='122' x2='150' y2='122'/><line x1='30' y1='136' x2='150' y2='136'/></g><path d='M176 104 l14 -8 l14 8 l-4 22 h-20 Z' fill='#c8b89a' stroke='#8a6a34' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='186' y='114' width='8' height='12' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Se ke ntlha ya phetogo ya karolo ya bobedi ya thuto. Van Riebeeck o ile a goroga ka Moranang 1652 le batho ba ka nnang masome a robongwe; ba ile ba aga lesakana le Tshingwana ya Khampani go fepa dikepe. Gatelela polelwana 'bonno jo bo nnelang ruri' - go farologana le ba Portugal ba ba neng ba ema fela, Ma-Dutch a ile a nna. Go nnela ruri gone ke gona go dirang gore 1652 e nne botlhokwa thata e bile go isa kwa ditlamoragong tse di mo selaeseng se se latelang. [SME] Netefatsa kgwedi ya go goroga le bogolo jo bo ka nnang jwa setlhopha sa van Riebeeck (gantsi bo neelwa e le mo e ka nnang 90) pele ga tlhagiso.

slides.eyebrow: Se se neng se raya eng mo Khoikhoi
slides.title: Phetogo mo bathong ba Kapa
slides.lead: Bonno jo bosha bo ile jwa tsaya ka bonya lefatshe le mafulo a Khoikhoi ba neng ba a ikaega ka ona.

blocks.text: Kwa tshimologong Ma-Dutch le Khoikhoi ba ne ba gwebisana. Mme fa bonno bo ntse bo gola, Ma-Dutch a ne a batla **lefatshe le legolo** la go lema - lefatshe le le tshwanang le Khoikhoi ba neng ba le dirisa go fudisa dikgomo tsa bona.

items: Khoikhoi ba ile ba latlhegelwa ke mafulo, mme fa nako e ntse e tsamaya, bontsi jwa dikgomo tsa bona.
Dikganetsano ka lefatshe le dikgomo di ile tsa isa kwa ntweng fa gare ga matlhakore a mabedi.
Botshelo jwa Khoikhoi le San bo ile jwa fetoga ka bosakhutleng ka ntlha ya bonno kwa Kapa.

media.alt: Mola wa legora o o kgaoganyang mafulo a matala, dikgomo di le ka fa letlhakoreng lengwe mme ntlo ya polasa e le ka fa go le lengwe.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='96' width='240' height='64' fill='#7a8b5a'/><g stroke='#6b6152' stroke-width='3'><line x1='120' y1='60' x2='120' y2='150'/><line x1='104' y1='84' x2='136' y2='84'/><line x1='104' y1='104' x2='136' y2='104'/></g><g fill='#5c3a1f'><ellipse cx='56' cy='112' rx='18' ry='9'/><rect x='44' y='112' width='3' height='12'/><rect x='66' y='112' width='3' height='12'/></g><g fill='#7a5a3a'><rect x='168' y='96' width='40' height='30'/></g><path d='M166 96 l22 -16 l22 16 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Neela tlamorago e kgolo ka phepafalo le ka tshiamiso. Kamano e ile ya simolola ka kgwebo mme ya fetoga fa banni ba batla lefatshe la go lema - lona mafulo a Khoikhoi ba neng ba a tlhoka a matsomane a bona. Se se ile sa isa kwa go latlhegelweng ke lefatshe, go latlhegelwa ke dikgomo, le kgotlhang. E boloke e le boammaaruri e bile e tshwanetse dingwaga; ntlha ke gore go goroga ga bonno go ile ga fetola botshelo jwa Khoikhoi le San ka bosakhutleng. Se se golaganya le dikgang tsa CAPS tsa moragonyana ka go kolonaiswa ga Kapa.

slides.title: Matlha a botlhokwa: 1488 go ya 1652

blocks.alt: Lenaneonako go tswa 1488 go ya 1652 le le supang Dias a dikologa Kapa, da Gama a fitlha India, kgotlhang ya 1510 kwa Table Bay, le van Riebeeck a goroga ka 1652.

events.label: Vasco da Gama o sepela go ya India
Kgotlhang le Khoikhoi kwa Table Bay
Dikepe tsa VOC ya Ma-Dutch di feta Kapa gantsi
Van Riebeeck o simolola seteishene sa go ijesa

slides.notes: Dirisa selaese seno go thusa barutwana go baya ditiragalo ka thulaganyo, bokgoni jwa botlhokwa jwa CAPS jwa Kgato ya Magareng. Ba kope go lemoga phatlha e telele fa gare ga maeto a ntlha a Portugal (bofelong jwa bo-1400) le bonno jwa Ma-Dutch (1652) - dingwaga tse di fetang 150. Ba Portugal ba ile ba fitlhela le go dirisa tsela ya lewatle; Ma-Dutch e ne e le bone ba ba ileng ba nna kwa Kapa kgabagare.

slides.eyebrow: Ke ka ntlha yang go le botlhokwa
slides.title: Matlhakore a mabedi a kgang e le nngwe
slides.lead: Maeto a a tshwanang a bonala a farologane thata go ya ka gore o mang.

items: Tsela ya lewatle e e yang mahumong a Botlhaba e ile ya bulwa.
Kgwebo le dikepe di ile tsa gola, mme Kapa ya nna lefelo la botlhokwa la go ema.
Ma-Dutch a ile a aga lefelo le le nnelang ruri kwa ntlheng ya Aforika.
Baeng ba ile ba goroga mo lefatsheng le e neng e setse e le legae la bona.
Ba ile ba latlhegelwa ke mafulo le dikgomo fa bonno bo ntse bo gola.
Mokgwa wa bona wa botshelo o ile wa fetoga ka bosakhutleng.

slides.notes: Se ke selaese sa go akanya. Ruta 'ponego' - hisitori e e tshwanang e utlwala jaaka katlego e e kgatlhang go tswa letlhakoreng la Yuropa mme e le tatlhegelo go tswa letlhakoreng la Khoisan. Kgothatsa barutwana go tshwara maammaaruri a mabedi ka nako e le nngwe. Se se supa go akanya ga hisitori mo go lekalekaneng e bile se ba baakanyetsa dipotso tsa go boelela.

slides.title: Se re se ithutileng
slides.lead: Basepedi ba dikepe ba Portugal ba ile ba fitlhela tsela ya lewatle go dikologa Aforika Borwa, mme Ma-Dutch a nna kwa Kapa moragonyana - a fetola botshelo jwa Khoisan.

blocks.text: Gakologelwa kgang: batho ba Yuropa ba ne ba batla tsela ya lewatle e e yang Botlhaba; **Dias** o ile a dikologa Kapa ka 1488 mme **da Gama** a fitlha India ka 1498; mme ka **1652 van Riebeeck** a aga seteishene sa go ijesa se se ileng sa gola sa nna bonno jo bo nnelang ruri.

blocks.question: Ke ka ntlha yang ba Portugal ba ne ba batla go dikologa ntlha ya Aforika ka sekepe?
Bolela bafuputsi ba babedi ba ba tumileng ba Portugal mo thutong eno mme o bolele se mongwe le mongwe a se dirileng.
Go goroga ga bonno jwa Ma-Dutch kwa Kapa go ile ga fetola botshelo jwa Khoikhoi jang?

slides.notes: Konela ka go boelela dikakgetlho tse tharo tsa botlhokwa: Dias (1488), da Gama (1497-98) le van Riebeeck (1652). Dirisa dipotso tse tharo jaaka tiro e e kwalwang kgotsa puisano ya phaposi; dintlha di latela mokgwa wa CAPS. Potso ya bofelo e lekola gore barutwana ba kgona go tlhalosa tlamorago, e seng fela go gakologelwa ntlha. Bontsha thuto e e latelang: go kolonaiswa ga Kapa mo makgolong a bo-17 le bo-18 a dingwaga.
